description.value:
This wand, carved from sacred wood and adorned with tribal decorations, holds the chaotic and unpredictable magic of the jungle.

When used, the Tribal Wand of Wonder can unleash a variety of effects, some unique to the traditions of its creators, while others align with the broader spectrum of wild magic.

Mechanics:

  • Activation: As an action, a user can wave the wand and choose a target within 120 feet. The wand then produces a magical effect.
  • Effect Determination: Roll a d100. On a result of 1-60, refer to the traditional Rod of Wonder table. On a result of 61-100, refer to the Tribal Effects table below.
  • Charges: The wand has 3 charges. Each use expends 1 charge. The wand regains 1d2 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ash and is destroyed.

@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.tables.RollTable.X03rbSjVcNNJNqa8]{Wand of Wonder}

d100 Roll

Effect

61-70

The target is surrounded by a swarm of harmless, glowing butterflies for 1 minute. This effect provides disadvantage on attacks against the target as the butterflies distract attackers.

71-80

The ground in a 30-foot radius around the target becomes difficult terrain as thick vines and roots sprout and writhe. This effect lasts for 1 minute.

81-85

The target is covered in a protective aura of ancestral spirits, granting them resistance to all damage for 1 minute.

86-90

The user and the target swap places instantly. If the target is unwilling, it can make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw to resist the effect.

91-100

The target is transformed into a small, harmless animal (such as a squirrel or a bird) for 1 minute. The target retains its mental faculties but cannot use any abilities or actions other than those of the new form.

Flavor Text: "This ornately decorated wand hums with the wild magic of the jungle. Crafted by tribal shamans, it holds the power to invoke both the wonders of nature and the unpredictability of wild magic. Each wave of the wand promises an outcome as mysterious as the deep jungles themselves, making it a favored tool for those who thrive on chaos and surprise."

unidentified.description:
This intricately carved wooden wand is adorned with colorful feathers, beads, and small animal bones, reflecting the craftsmanship of a skilled tribal artisan.

The wand feels warm to the touch, and when held, it seems to hum with an ancient, unpredictable energy.

The intricate patterns and adornments suggest it is more than just a decorative piece, hinting at hidden magical properties waiting to be discovered.
unidentified.name: Mystical Tribal Wand

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.
